Articleô  425. Commandersô  andô  personnelô  onô  dutyô  whoô  causeô  seriousô  consequencesô  byô  leavingô  theirô  postsô  withoutô  permissionô  orô  by
neglectingô theirô dutiesô shallô beô sentencedô toô notô moreô thanô threeô yearsô inô prisonô orô criminalô detention. Inô theô eventô ofô especiallyô serious
consequences,ô theyô shallô beô sentencedô toô notô lessô thanô threeô yearsô andô notô moreô thanô sevenô yearsô inô prison. Thoseô whoô commitô theô crimesô mentionedô inô theô precedingô paragraphô inô wartimeô shallô beô sentencedô toô notô lessô thanô fiveô yearsô inô prison. Articleô 426. Thoseô whoô obstructô commandersô orô personnelô onô dutyô fromô performingô theirô dutiesô throughô violenceô orô intimidationô shallô be
sentencedô toô notô moreô thanô fiveô yearsô inô prisonô orô criminalô detention. Ifô theô circumstancesô areô serious,ô theyô shallô beô sentencedô toô notô less
thanô fiveô yearsô inô prison. Inô theô eventô ofô seriousô injuriesô orô deaths,ô orô otherô especiallyô seriousô circumstances,ô theyô shallô beô sentencedô toô life
imprisonmentô orô death.ô Ifô theyô commitô theseô actsô inô wartime,ô theyô shallô beô givenô stiffô punishment. Articleô 427. Thoseô whoô causeô seriousô consequencesô byô abusingô theirô powersô andô directingô theirô subordinatesô toô engageô inô activitiesô in
violationô ofô theirô dutiesô shallô beô sentencedô toô notô moreô thanô fiveô yearsô inô prisonô orô criminalô detention. Ifô theô circumstancesô areô especially
serious,ô theyô shallô beô sentencedô toô notô lessô thanô fiveô yearsô andô notô moreô thanô 10ô yearsô inô prison. Articleô 428. Commandersô whoô causeô seriousô consequencesô byô turningô awayô fromô battleô orô actingô passivelyô inô combatô inô defianceô of
ordersô shallô beô sentencedô toô notô moreô thanô fiveô yearsô inô prison.
